Monthly PM (SM167)
Can damage during packing near loader. Changed infeed conveyor speed from 40 to 29, running better wothout broken cans.

UV Checks (SM150)
Air compressor inspection (SM55)

Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK
Morning checks: air compressor pressure OK, chiller temps normal, glycol level OK, no leaks
Film wrap Conveyor slipping, realigned with Viktor’s help and checked okay.
Pallet getting stuck at infeed and a pallet fell at discharge. Realigned and checked okay.
Filler and seamer jam - Broken can piece in the way, cleared and was fixed. Also increase the water flow
Drain clogged - Fixed. Blenders needs to be careful while cleaning as to many debris caused the clogg
Startup 4 pk continuous Run
Wasn't working with the Zevia 355 12 pk program (#1055). Created new program (#2037) and made necessary adjustments for the pack and it run ok afterwards.
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK

Falling cans at Depal, reduced the lifting speed to 30 from 40
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK

The whole sequence got wrong and cases placed was wrong causing the jam inside shutter gripper. Taken out all the cases and was okay. Also resetted whole machine to resolve sequence issue.
Film got torn and went inside. Placed it properly.
Pm
Fallen cases. Cases have fallen on top of the sensors. Placed all sensors properly and ran good.
Changeover to 4pk
The falling of can and stopping the machine. Changed the program to 0006 and reduced total machine speed to 80 and ran good.
Did fine tuning for RA Jones, Variopac and line
Just Found E stop broken. Please replace it during CIP.
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK
Morning checks: air compressor pressure OK, chiller temps normal, glycol level OK, no leaks
Constant 5411 issue, wrong program in the system. Fixed
Replaced E-stop on operator panel during CIP
2nd  glue station loader top checked the filter, replaced the nozzle and purged the burned glue and test.
Logopak Templete issue - after bypassing a partial pallet, the system went to default value which changed the case per pallet to 208 instead of 104. Recommand to create sperate files or each recipe
Replaced air block at station 72. And made the used spare as well

Startup check completed - all OK
Did necessary adjustments at variopac and Rajones
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK
Morning checks: air compressor pressure OK, chiller temps normal, glycol level OK, no leaks
Refilled 2 N2 dewars
Silo 2 gate valve wasn't activating. Checked the breaker and system was good. Rebooted the silo to get it ready.
HVAC wasn't working at office, fixed.
Changeover to 4 pk
2 of the rollers got broken, replaced. Also changed the height from 154 to 162
Changeover to 12 pk
Taptone setup and calibrated
CIP pump tripped. Reset it
Leak fixed at GNS pump, replaced the gasket
Changeover to 12 loose
Open flap. Moved the position of glue station and was good.
Videojet 03 Dry end PM. (SM234)
Filled nitrogen dozer
Morning checks: air compressor pressure OK, chiller temps normal, glycol level OK, no leaks
Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Weekly PM. Inspection carried out, replaced one muffler.
Did inspection and reset all 3 alarm in the HVAC's.
Refilled 1 N2 Dewar
“packs incorrectly wrapped” alarm. Adjusted the film sensor PE321.
Heat exchanger opened up. Need replacement for the fix, already in order.
Mounted the pump onto the pump cart
Sensor issue, film conveyor belt
Videojet 03 Dry end PM. (SM234)
Helped in starting up nitrogen
Replaced the nitrogen dewer
Changeover from 24loose to 4pk, tested Variopac and line. Setup anti slip and everything good.
During starting Loader jam. Adjusted the width and height to make it run smooth

Format 4 pack, slick. 
The box did not open completely as a result it was overload.
The suction cups did not take the cardboard from the cassette well
Cylinder nozzle for Table #2 was broken which was refurbished and fixed.
Numerous stops during the shift. Poor quality of cardboard, glued cardboard. 4pk. Sleek
Full boiler inspection: pressure normal, burner operating, no leaks, safety valves OK

Weekly PM

Cleaned sensors, checked operation, lubricated mechanical adjustment points
Open flap. Adjusted the glue station and the width. After it was good. Also adjusted the infeed line to resolve falling of cans
Layer was not placing properly. Changed the sensing correction from -60 to -68. Also changed the height from 158 to 160

Driver malfunction pusher 1. Checked all the sensor and driver which was good. Tried to bypass in program didn't work. Tried power cycle it and still it was same. Checked the panel and there was an error popped out. Resettled it and was good
Loader jam. We had to adjust all the parameters as the carton was different type. Adjusted transfer width, flap closer. Infeed guides and heights to right position to make it run good.
Fixed the door 4 top curtain
Boiler water level checked - within normal range, feed pump operating correctly
Morning checks: air compressor pressure OK, chiller temps normal, glycol level OK, no leaks
Laminar hood UV lamp replacement done, tested okay, inspected machine and found okay.
Cartons glued on the inside. Ran machine slower to avoid loader jams and stayed in line till end of run to help avoid loader jams.
Glycol pump lubrication done
Pump lubrication done
HLT Golden Boy pump lubrication done.
pH electrode monthly calibration done, senor value 9.77, lab reading 10.09, reference updated to 10.09.
Shipping area Dock 1. Repair of the locking mechanism
Morning checks: air compressor pressure OK, chiller temps normal, glycol level OK, no leaks
Wastewater PM: pit level checked, pumps operating, no blockages, discharge normal

Sleek loos 24 pk. 
Multiple line stoppages due to poor film cutting. Increased the roller pressure and reduced the vacuum. These adjustments helped improve the cutting performance.
Replaced the air pressure regulator on the  roller.
Uneven pallets were causing the issue. Adjusted the min and max pallet parameters referencing Zevia Blue pallet program and also, changed the Sensing position 0mm from -50mm

bbw_worklog.description: Issue due to bulged cans, picked out bulged cans from the line, adjusted infeed guides and machine running fine.

bbw_worklog.description: Pusher A was not holding the case as intended which created a gap in the layer pattern as shown in the picture. This made cases fall out while palletizing. Adjusted the closed infeed parameter for Pusher A from 600 to 590mm
